sync.success: Browser data has been synchronized to Supabase.
sync.partial: {{count}} entries could not be synchronized. First error: {{first}}

auth.subtitle: Real sign-in
auth.title: Sign in to Farm-Manager
auth.copy: Sign in with your personal account. Drivers are taken straight to the mobile driver view.
auth.adminCopy: Sign in for dispatch, farm administration and master data.
auth.driverCopy: Sign in as a driver. You will go straight to your tasks.
auth.profileMissing: No profile was found for the signed-in user.
auth.supabaseRequired: Supabase must be configured for real sign-in.
auth.driverAppRequired: This account belongs to the driver app. Please open /fahrer.
auth.adminAppRequired: This account belongs to the admin app. Please open /admin.
auth.driverLoginRequired: Please sign in with a driver account.
auth.adminLoginRequired: Please sign in with an admin, farmer or dispatcher account.
auth.adminSignedInCopy: You are signed in as an admin. Please open the admin app.
auth.driverSignedInCopy: You are signed in as a driver. Please open the driver app.

permissions.fieldsReadOnly: This role can view fields but cannot edit them.
permissions.driversReadOnly: This role can view drivers but cannot edit them.
permissions.organizationsReadOnly: This role can view businesses but cannot edit them.
permissions.jobsReadOnly: This role can view jobs but cannot create them.

archive.confirmPermanentDelete: Do you really want to permanently delete “{{item}}”? This action cannot be undone.

driverVisibility.assigned_only: Only jobs assigned through dispatch planning

masterData.personnelTimeVacationTitle: Time tracking, vacation and vacation planning
masterData.personnelTimeVacationHint: Review working times, breaks and open vacation requests centrally per employee.
masterData.payrollPreparationHint: Review monthly data per employee, correct time entries and export PDF reports for payroll.
masterData.organizationKindLockedHint: The business type is locked to avoid incorrect company relationships.
masterData.driverEmailDuplicate: This email address is already used for {{name}}. Please use a unique driver email.
masterData.organizationLoginHint: Creates or updates the Farm-Manager login for this business.
masterData.organizationLoginRequiresSupabase: Logins can only be created with an active Supabase connection.
masterData.organizationLoginMissingData: Please enter email and a password with at least 6 characters.
masterData.noJobTypeTasks: No tasks stored yet. Without tasks, dispatch plans freely.

collaboration.invitationMailBody:
Hello,

{{fromOrganization}} would like to collaborate with {{targetOrganization}} in Farm-Manager.

Message:
{{message}}

Please sign in to Farm-Manager and confirm the invitation under Master data > Collaboration.

App: {{appUrl}}

Best regards

mapEdit.accessHint: Click the map to set the new access point.
mapEdit.hazardHint: Click the map to set the hazard and add a description.
mapEdit.noAttachments: No photos or documents stored yet.

dashboard.hero: Jobs, fields and drivers in one shared work status.
dashboard.gpsSummary: Field boundaries, access points and {{count}} hazards are stored.
dashboard.noAlertsProblems: There are currently no notes or issues.
dashboard.fieldsMapSubtitle: All company fields at a glance.
dashboard.noFieldsMap: No fields yet. Open field master data.

fields.confirmDeleteField: Permanently delete field “{{field}}”? This action cannot be undone.
fields.contractorReleaseHint: Only selected contractors can see this field in maps, jobs and dispatch planning.
fields.bulkReleaseAppliedNotice: Release set for {{fields}} fields and {{contractors}} contractors.
fields.bulkReleaseRemovedNotice: Release removed for {{fields}} fields and {{contractors}} contractors.
fields.drawingHint: Click boundary points on the map. From 3 points the field can be applied.
fields.noHistoryMatches: No history entries match the filters.

createJob.saved: Job was saved as a record.
createJob.geoMissingAccess: This field is missing an access point. Drivers cannot navigate reliably.
createJob.geoMissingBoundary: This field is missing a boundary. The driver cannot see the exact work area.
createJob.geoMissingRoute: This field is missing access instructions.
createJob.geoMissingHazards: No hazards are stored for this field.
createJob.driverIssue: Driver reports a question from the field.
createJob.freeDispatchPlanning: No work chain selected. Resources will be planned by dispatch.
createJob.resourceNeedStandard: Use resource need from work chain
createJob.defineTaskFirst: 1. Define work chain, date and tasks
createJob.mapFieldSelectionHint: Click fields directly on the map. Selected field parcels are highlighted in blue.
createJob.missingRequiredFields: Please select a farmer, operating business, at least one task and one field.
createJob.workModeHelpSingle: Single mode: one driver or machine works exclusively on the subtask.
createJob.workModeHelpTeam: Team mode: multiple drivers or machines may work on the same subtask at the same time.
createJob.workModeHelpRole: Role mode: different roles work together, for example harvester, haulers and compactor tractor.
createJob.workModeHelpSplit: Area split: a field parcel is split into sections that can be worked in parallel.

jobs.duplicateDriverAssignment: This driver is already assigned to this subtask.
jobs.duplicateVehicleAssignment: This vehicle is already assigned to this subtask.
jobs.plannedCrewsBelowAssignments: There are more driver/vehicle assignments than planned crews. Please remove an assignment first.
jobs.activityLogHint: Feedback, completed quantities, notes, issue reports and photos from the driver view.
jobs.noDriverActivities: No driver activities have been documented for this job yet.
jobs.noMatchingJobs: No jobs match the current filters.
jobs.confirmBulkDelete: Permanently delete {{count}} selected jobs? This action cannot be undone.

driver.selectFieldForTask: Now select a field from the route-optimized list.
driver.selectedFieldReady: Field selected. Check access, navigation and start work when you arrive.
driver.confirmFieldClaimText: Do you want to claim “{{field}}” now? Your current location will be sent and the job will open.
driver.noMapData: No map or access data has been maintained for this field yet.
driver.travelMissingValues: Please enter travel kilometers and time.
driver.timeEntryInvalidRange: Please check: an end time is before the start time.
driver.vacationInvalid: Please choose a valid vacation period.
driver.personalDataButtonHint: {{remaining}} vacation days left, request and monthly times
driver.personalPageHint: Personal data, vacation requests and working times from previous months.
driver.noTimeEntriesForDay: No time entries for this day.
driver.noVisibleJobs: No jobs are currently visible for you.
driver.alreadyJoined: You are already assigned to this subtask.
driver.noSlots: Already claimed or no free slots.
driver.machineYardHint: Tap a vehicle or implement. The selection is assigned automatically to the next job.
driver.noYardVehicles: No machines available in the machine yard.
driver.noYardImplements: No implements available in the machine yard.
driver.equipmentNotePlaceholder: e.g. refueled, cleaned, damage, remaining quantity, location
driver.endShiftHint: Document where the vehicle and implements are after the shift.
driver.shiftEndNotePlaceholder: e.g. tank remains attached, parked full in yard, check hydraulic line
driver.driverHandoverHint: Select the next driver and note the condition of equipment and job handover.
driver.handoverNotePlaceholder: e.g. job continues, tractor is parked by field edge, slurry tank half full
driver.claimSyncFailed: Job claimed locally. Sync will be retried automatically.
driver.equipmentProblemSaved: Machine issue saved and notification queued.
driver.noDriverLogin: No driver master-data record is linked to this login.
driver.hazardPlaceholder: e.g. tree trunk at the access point, needs clearing

masterDataOverview.title: Master data
masterDataOverview.subtitle: Central overview for companies, contacts, resources, inputs and reusable planning templates.

companyData.title: Company data
companyData.description: Only own company data such as name, organization number, address, contact, logo, language and billing data.

customers.title: Customers
customers.description: Customer numbers, contacts, addresses, communication details, notes and active status.

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.description: Supplier contacts with category, address, notes and active status.

personnel.title: Personnel
personnel.description: Roles, contacts, permissions, default machine and archive status.

machines.title: Machines
machines.description: Type, license plate, make, model, year, hours, status and default driver.

implements.title: Implements
implements.description: Type, make, working width and implement status.

products.title: Products
products.description: Inputs such as film, seed, fertilizer or additives with unit, supplier and price.

tasks.title: Tasks
tasks.description: Work mode, progress metric, unit, duration and resource requirements.

workChains.title: Work chains
workChains.description: Reusable task sequences with order, dependencies and default crews.

masterDataOverview.workChainExampleSilage: Grass silage: mowing → tedding → raking → chopping → hauling → rolling
masterDataOverview.productsSectionHint: The products area is prepared; dedicated production storage is not connected yet.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Manage active and inactive connections to Farm-Manager businesses.

contacts.title: Customers / suppliers
contacts.description: Shared address book with category, contact details, notes and active status.

products.sectionHint: Manage inputs with current stock, prices, incoming and outgoing movements, and documents.
products.noProducts: No inputs have been created yet.
products.noMovements: No movements for this input yet.

contractor.userManagementHint: Support admins manage business logins for farmers and contractors here.
contractor.standardVehiclePlanningHint: This setting is used when dragging personnel onto a job in the dispatch calendar.
contractor.dispatchGroupingHint: This setting controls whether grouped dispatch combines multiple jobs with the same task or keeps each job separate.
contractor.standardVehicleDialogText: {{vehicle}} is stored as the default machine for this person.
contractor.noStandardVehicleFound: No available default machine is stored for this person.
contractor.dragDropHint: Drag resources onto jobs or move jobs to another day
contractor.keepResourcesOnMove: This job already has assigned resources. Keep drivers, machines and implements when moving it?
contractor.dispatchCarryover: Move approx. {{hours}} remaining time to next day
contractor.workTimeWarningText: This person is already planned for {{planned}}. This job would add {{added}}. Total {{total}} with a maximum of {{max}}. Assign anyway?
contractor.mapProviderHint: OpenStreetMap remains the working map with field boundaries and live pins. Google, Hitta.se and Lantmäteriet open as external map links.

pricing.customerConditionsPlaceholder: One condition per line: task; unit; price; currency; valid from; valid to
pricing.customerConditionsHint: Maintain customer prices per task. These values override the standard price list for this customer.

report.completionHint: Review only fully completed jobs or issue cases released by dispatch and prepare them for documentation and billing.
report.noCompletionJobs: No jobs for this filter selection.
report.archiveRequiresInvoice: Jobs can only be archived after they are marked as invoiced in completion and an invoice number is stored.
report.invoiceAttachmentSubtitle: Proof of work for all jobs assigned to this invoice number.
report.invoiceAttachmentFooter: This report was generated from the Farm-Manager completion area and serves as a traceable invoice attachment.

resourceHistory.title: Resource history
resourceHistory.empty: No history exists for this resource yet.

liveLocation.noLocations: No driver positions yet. Start tracking or send a location from the driver view.
liveLocation.sentFallback: GPS unavailable. Fallback field position was sent.
liveLocation.permissionDenied: GPS permission is not granted. Please allow location access for this app in the browser/device settings. A fallback field position was sent for now.
liveLocation.timeout: GPS could not be resolved in time. Try again outside or with better reception. A fallback field position was sent.
liveLocation.positionUnavailable: GPS position is currently unavailable. Please check device location settings. A fallback field position was sent.
liveLocation.notSupported: This device or browser does not support GPS permission. A fallback field position was sent.
liveLocation.insecureContext: GPS only works via HTTPS, localhost or an installed app. Please open the app via a secure address. A fallback field position was sent.
liveLocation.testLocationHint: Sends field/access point instead of PC GPS.
liveLocation.testLocationSent: Test position at the field was sent.
